scripts.dev: bun run assemble && bun run prepare-content && astro dev
scripts.prebuild: bun run assemble && bun run prepare-content
scripts.validate: bun run assemble && bun run prepare-content && astro check
scripts.deploy: bun run assemble && bun run prepare-content && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' astro build && bunx wrangler deploy
